introSection: F.L.Y. is a steel launched flying roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. It is the first flying roller coaster with a launch, as well as being the longest flying coaster in the world.

sections.title: History
sections.content: Erection of the ride started in July 2017.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: The queue line is equipped with metal detectors, so guests must not have any loose articles before riding.

fullText:
F.L.Y. is a steel launched flying roller coaster located at Phantasialand in Brühl, North Rhine-Westphalia, Germany. It is the first flying roller coaster with a launch, as well as being the longest flying coaster in the world.

Erection of the ride started in July 2017.

The queue line is equipped with metal detectors, so guests must not have any loose articles before riding.
